name: Cyborg Apes
teaser: Power up your minions with powerful play-on-minion actions.
mechanics: Power up your minions with powerful play-on-minion actions.

name: Shapeshifters
teaser: Copy other players' power and abilities, boost your minions' power, and destroy and replace your minions with other minions, especially from your deck.
mechanics: Copy other players' power and abilities, boost your minions' power, and destroy and replace your minions with other minions, especially from your deck.

name: Super Spies
teaser: Sort your deck, take a peek and manipulate the top of each player's deck, force your opponents to discard cards, and play specials while bases are scoring.
mechanics: Sort your deck, take a peek and manipulate the top of each player's deck, force your opponents to discard cards, and play specials while bases are scoring.

name: Time Travelers
teaser: Repeat the abilities of your minions in play, retrieve cards from your discard pile, especially actions, and manipulate bases.
mechanics: Repeat the abilities of your minions in play, retrieve cards from your discard pile, especially actions, and manipulate bases.
